headline: Rehabilitation Services Reach Only 15% of Stroke Survivors
context: Post-stroke rehabilitation is available to a small fraction of patients due to severe therapist shortages.

cards.big: Only 15% of 42,000 annual stroke survivors receive adequate rehabilitation services
cards.sub: Malaysia has 1 physiotherapist per 11,000 population versus recommended 1 per 2,000

cards.big: Stroke patients without rehabilitation have 3 times higher rates of permanent disability
cards.sub: Early intensive rehabilitation can reduce disability by 60% in the first 6 months

cards.big: Average wait time for rehabilitation initiation is 6 weeks post-stroke in public hospitals
cards.sub: International guidelines recommend starting rehabilitation within 24-48 hours

cards.big: Norway's municipal rehabilitation model achieves 78% functional recovery rate within 12 months
cards.sub: Community-based rehabilitation closer to home improves adherence and outcomes

cards.big: Saving a stroke patient's life without rehabilitating their function is only half a victory
Should stroke rehabilitation be guaranteed as an extension of acute stroke treatment
